description: World's largest pure-play semiconductor testing company. Services: wafer probing, wafer grinding/dicing, IC final testing, burn-in testing, system-level testing. Revenue breakdown: ~43% wafer-level testing, ~50% finished IC testing, ~7% wafer grinding/dicing. Trailing 12-month revenue ~$1.02B USD. Headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan. Recently divested Chinese subsidiary (Suzhou) due to geopolitical tensions.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing equipment (world #1 prober buyer)
_externalRelationships.notes: World's #1 pure-play IC testing house. Massive consumer of wafer probing equipment - one of Accretech's most important Taiwan clients. Located in Hsinchu semiconductor corridor near Accretech Taiwan Co., Ltd. Market cap ~330B TWD (~7.5T JPY).

_metadata.dataSource: KYEC IR, TWSE, APAC semiconductor industry research
